storyBeat: 一群小孩在花園玩 — 一個小司馬光在看

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: Long ago in old China, a boy named Sima Guang lived. Tonight's story has a few new words. Let's learn them first!
questions.sentenceZh: 今晚的故事會用到幾個新字，我們先把它們學會！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：今晚要講司馬光的故事，先來認識幾個關鍵字，記住了故事更好聽喔！

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個字都在司馬光的故事裡：
🔑 jar = 水缸
🔑 garden = 花園
🔑 friend = 朋友
🔑 boy = 男孩

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
再來四個：
🔑 water = 水
🔑 stone = 石頭
🔑 climb = 爬
🔑 run = 跑

questions.sentence: Which one is a jar?
questions.question: Which one is a jar?
questions.explanationZh: jar = 水缸 🏺！故事裡有一個很大的水缸放在花園角落。

questions.sentence: Which one shows a stone?
questions.question: Which one shows a stone?
questions.explanationZh: stone = 石頭 🪨！司馬光在草地上看到了一顆大石頭。

questions.sentence: The children played in the garden.
questions.sentenceZh: 小孩們在花園裡玩。
questions.question: Which picture matches the sentence?
options: children running in an open garden
a boy reading books at a desk
a girl sleeping under a tree
an old man sitting on a bench
optionsZh: 小孩在寬闊的花園跑來跑去
一個男孩坐在書桌前看書
questions.explanationZh: garden = 花園，sentence 說小孩們在花園裡玩——圖中正好是小孩在花園跑來跑去。

storyBeat: 一個小孩爬上大水缸 — 想看裡面

questions.speaker: grandma
questions.sentence: A few more words to learn — then the story begins!
questions.sentenceZh: 再記幾個字，故事就要開始了！
questions.explanationZh: 奶奶說：再學幾個重要的字，學會了，故事就更好懂囉！

questions.sentence: Match each Chinese phrase to its English.
questions.explanationZh:
這四個片語都出現在司馬光的故事裡：
🔑 climb up = 爬上去
🔑 fall in = 掉下來
🔑 pick up = 撿起來
🔑 break open = 打破

questions.sentence: Sima Guang picked up a heavy stone.
questions.sentenceZh: 司馬光撿起一顆重石頭。
questions.question: Which picture matches 'a boy picking up a stone'?
options: a boy lifting a heavy stone
a boy climbing a tall tree
an old woman in the garden
questions.explanationZh: stone = 石頭，句子說司馬光撿起一顆重石頭——圖中正好是男孩用雙手舉起石頭。

questions.sentence: Which emoji shows something breaking apart?
questions.question: Which one shows breaking?
questions.explanationZh: break = 破 💥！司馬光把石頭丟向水缸，水缸就破掉了。

questions.sentence: Sima Guang ___ the stone at the jar.
questions.sentenceEasy: Sima Guang ___ the stone at the jar.
questions.sentenceHard: Without stopping to think, Sima Guang ___ the stone hard at the side of the jar.
questions.question: Which word is correct?
questions.explanationZh:
這個句子說的是過去發生的事，throw 的過去式是 threw（不規則動詞）。
完整句：Sima Guang threw the stone at the jar.

questions.sentence: Let's review all the new words from this lesson.
questions.explanationZh:
把這節的重點字再複習一遍：
🔑 break = 破
🔑 smart = 聰明
🔑 fall = 跌
🔑 heavy = 重

storyBeat: 小孩掉進水缸 — 大家會怎樣?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 top = 頂端
🔑 slip = 滑
🔑 fall = 跌
🔑 water = 水
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The boy reached the top edge of the jar.
questions.explanationZh: 小孩爬到水缸的頂端。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: For a moment he sat on the rim and smiled down at his friends.
questions.question: What did the boy do at the very top?
questions.explanationZh: 「sat + smiled down」——坐在上面開心地笑著,就是「坐著很開心」!
questions.sentenceZh: 有那麼一刻,他坐在水缸邊緣,對著朋友笑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then his foot suddenly slipped without any warning.
questions.questionEn: Did the boy plan to fall in?
questions.explanationZh: 「突然滑了 + 沒預警」——完全不是故意的!「他是計畫要掉進去的嗎?」答案是 No!
questions.sentenceZh: 然後他的腳突然滑了,完全沒有預警。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He fell into the water with a loud splash.
questions.explanationZh: 他「噗通」一聲掉進水裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water closed over his head. He could not breathe.
questions.question: What was happening to the boy in the water?
questions.explanationZh: 「water closed over head + could not breathe」——水蓋過頭了,就是「正在下沉」的危險情況!
questions.sentenceZh: 水淹過他的頭。他沒辦法呼吸。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The other children stopped playing and stared with wide eyes.
questions.explanationZh: 其他小孩停下遊戲,瞪大眼睛看。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: No one had ever seen something like this before.
questions.question: How did the other children look in that moment?
questions.explanationZh: 「wide eyes + never seen」——眼睛瞪大、從沒看過——就是「震驚又僵住」的樣子!
questions.sentenceZh: 以前沒有人見過這樣的事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "Help! Help!" they cried, but no grown-up was close by.
questions.explanationZh: 「救命!救命!」他們大喊,但附近沒有大人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the children feel when no adult came?
questions.question: How did they feel?
questions.explanationZh: 大喊救命卻沒大人來——當然是「害怕又不知所措」啦!
questions.sentenceZh: 當沒有大人來的時候,小孩們有什麼感覺?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Most of the children turned and ran out of the garden...
questions.explanationZh: 大部分小孩轉身跑出花園……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 滑落 = slip｜🔑 下沉 = sink｜🔑 呼吸 = breathe｜🔑 大喊 = shout。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then his foot slipped and he fell in with no warning.
questions.sentenceZh: 然後他的腳突然滑了,完全沒有預警。
questions.question: How did the boy fall into the jar?
questions.explanationZh: 課文說「腳突然滑了」——是不小心失腳,完全沒預警!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water closed over his head. He could not breathe.
questions.sentenceZh: 水淹過他的頭。他沒辦法呼吸。
questions.questionEn: Was the boy safe after falling in?
questions.explanationZh: 水淹過頭頂、沒辦法呼吸——完全不安全!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The other children all stared with wide eyes. No one had seen this before.
questions.sentenceZh: 其他小孩全都睜大眼睛盯著看。沒有人見過這樣的事。
questions.question: How did the other children react?
questions.explanationZh: 「睜大眼睛盯著」——完全愣在那裡、從來沒見過這種事!那就是「震驚地盯著看」!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water closed over his head.
questions.sentenceZh: 水淹過他的頭。
questions.question: Which emoji shows the danger the boy was in?
questions.explanationZh: 水淹過頭頂——這就是溺水的危險!🌊 代表那個可怕的瞬間。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The children shouted for help, but no adult was near.
questions.sentenceZh: 小孩們大喊救命,但附近沒有大人。
questions.questionEn: Did an adult come quickly to help?
questions.explanationZh: 附近沒有大人——大人沒有立刻出現!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: For one moment, he sat on the rim and smiled down at his friends.
questions.sentenceZh: 有那麼一刻,他坐在水缸邊緣,對著朋友笑。
questions.question: What was the boy doing just before he fell?
questions.explanationZh: 掉下去之前他還坐在邊緣笑呢——結果腳突然一滑!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Then his foot slipped and he fell in with no warning.
questions.sentenceZh: 然後他的腳突然滑了,完全沒有預警。
questions.questionEn: Was the boy planning to fall into the jar?
questions.explanationZh: 「完全沒有預警」——這是意外,不是計畫!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The children shouted for help, but no adult was near.
questions.sentenceZh: 小孩們大喊救命,但附近沒有大人。
questions.question: Why was shouting for help a problem?
options: the noise was too soft to hear
questions.explanationZh: 大喊也沒用,因為「附近沒有大人」——這就是問題所在!

storyBeat: 其他孩子都跑走找大人 — 來得及嗎?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 run = 跑
🔑 path = 路
🔑 adult = 大人
🔑 far = 遠
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Most of the children turned and ran out of the garden to find an adult.
questions.explanationZh: 大部分的小孩轉身跑出花園去找大人。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Their small feet ran fast on the path.
questions.question: How were the children moving on the path?
options: running as fast as they could
climbing over a low stone wall
questions.explanationZh: 「small feet ran fast」——腳跑得很快,就是「盡力跑得快」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他們的小腳在路上跑得飛快。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They ran fast, but the garden gate was very far away.
questions.questionEn: Would help come back in time?
questions.explanationZh: 跑得快,但大門好遠——等大人跑回來太慢了!「幫忙趕得及嗎?」答案是 No!
questions.sentenceZh: 他們跑得很快,但花園大門非常遠。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Back at the jar, the boy was still under the water.
questions.explanationZh: 回到水缸旁,小孩還在水裡。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every second, the water held him tighter.
questions.question: What was happening to the boy now?
options: he was getting out by himself
he was making bubbles for fun
time was running out for him
questions.explanationZh: 「every second + held tighter」——每秒都更危險,就是「時間快沒了」!
questions.sentenceZh: 每過一秒,水就把他抓得更緊。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The path to the front gate was long and full of corners.
questions.explanationZh: 通到大門的路很長,而且有很多轉彎。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Even fast feet would take many minutes to come back.
questions.question: How long would help take to arrive?
questions.explanationZh: 「many minutes」——好幾分鐘,就是「好一段時間」!朋友在水裡等不了那麼久!
questions.sentenceZh: 就算跑得再快,也要花很多分鐘才能回來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The garden grew very quiet around the big jar.
questions.explanationZh: 大水缸周圍的花園變得很安靜。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was the mood near the big jar?
questions.question: How did it feel?
questions.explanationZh: 小孩在水裡、大人在遠處——分分秒秒都緊繃,就是「時間快沒了」的感覺!
questions.sentenceZh: 大水缸旁邊的氣氛是什麼感覺?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: But one small boy did not run with the others...
questions.explanationZh: 但有一個小男孩沒有跟其他人一起跑……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 跑 = run｜🔑 大門 = gate｜🔑 分鐘 = minute｜🔑 遠 = far。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Their small feet ran fast along the path.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們的小腳在路上跑得飛快。
questions.question: How did the children move along the path?
questions.explanationZh: 「小腳跑得飛快」——就是「盡全力跑」的意思!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They ran fast, but the garden gate was very far away.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們跑得很快,但花園大門非常遠。
questions.questionEn: Was the garden gate close to the water jar?
questions.explanationZh: 課文說「大門非常遠」——水缸和大門距離很遠!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every second, the water held him tighter.
questions.sentenceZh: 每過一秒,水就把他抓得更緊。
questions.question: What was happening to the boy in the water?
questions.explanationZh: 「每過一秒」水抓得更緊——時間越長,危險越大!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Even running fast, it would take many minutes to come back.
questions.sentenceZh: 就算跑得再快,也要花很多分鐘才能回來。
questions.question: Which emoji shows running in a hurry?
questions.explanationZh: 「跑得快」就是 🏃 的動作——爭分奪秒往外衝!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Their small feet ___ fast along the path.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們的小腳在路上___得飛快。
questions.question: Choose the correct verb form.
questions.explanationZh: 這是過去發生的事,所以用過去式「ran」——run 的過去式是 ran!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Every second, the water held him tighter.
questions.sentenceZh: 每過一秒,水就把他抓得更緊。
questions.questionEn: Did the boy have plenty of time to wait for help?
questions.explanationZh: 每一秒水都抓更緊——時間非常緊!他根本等不了!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Even running fast, it would take many minutes to come back.
questions.sentenceZh: 就算跑得再快,也要花很多分鐘才能回來。
questions.question: Why was running to get an adult not a good solution?
options: no adults were home that day
the path was blocked by rocks
coming back would take too long
the adults were in a meeting
questions.explanationZh: 就算跑得快也要好幾分鐘——朋友在水裡等不了那麼久,所以這方法行不通!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: They ran fast, but the garden gate was very far away.
questions.sentenceZh: 他們跑得很快,但花園大門非常遠。
questions.questionEn: Were the children slow runners?
questions.explanationZh: 課文說「跑得很快」——他們跑得很快,只是大門太遠了!答案是 No!

questions.sentence: They ran very fast.
accept: All of them ran very fast.
questions.explanationZh: ran 是 run 的過去式。They ran very fast. = 他們跑得非常快。
questions.sentenceZh: 他們跑得非常快。

questions.sentence: The gate was very far.
accept: The gate was so far away.
The garden gate was very far.
questions.explanationZh: far = 遠，gate = 大門。The gate was very far. = 大門離這裡非常遠。
questions.sentenceZh: 大門離水缸非常遠。

questions.sentence: Time was short. He had to act now.
questions.answer: Time was short. He had to act now.
accept: Time was running out. He had to act now.
There was no time. He had to act at once.
Time was short and he had to act right away.
He had no time. He had to act now.
questions.explanationZh: time was short = 時間快沒了；had to act = 必須行動。兩個短句合起來表達緊迫感！
questions.sentenceZh: 時間快沒了，他必須馬上行動。

questions.sentence: The other children ran to find a grown-up. The path to the gate was long and full of corners. Even fast feet would take many minutes to come back.
questions.question: What does this tell us about the plan to fetch an adult?
options: it would work if they hurried hard enough
the boy in the jar could hold on easily
waiting for outside help put the boy at risk
a grown-up was already on the way back
optionsZh: 只要跑夠快還是來得及
水裡的小孩可以輕鬆等著
等外面的人來救太危險了
大人其實已經在趕回來了
questions.explanationZh: 路又長又彎、就算跑得快也要好幾分鐘才能回來——這說明等外面的人來根本來不及，水裡的小孩等不了那麼久。選項 C 正確地推斷出：等外面的人來救太危險了。

storyBeat: 司馬光留下沒跑 — 他想做什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 stay = 留下
🔑 look = 看
🔑 short = 短
🔑 think = 想
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One small boy did not run with the others.
questions.explanationZh: 有一個小男孩沒有跟其他人一起跑。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It was the quiet one with the bright eyes.
questions.question: Who was the boy who stayed?
options: the loud boy who led them
questions.explanationZh: 「quiet one + bright eyes」——這是前面介紹過的司馬光!選「安靜的司馬光」!
questions.sentenceZh: 是那個安靜的、眼睛明亮的男孩。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He stood by the jar instead of running away.
questions.questionEn: Did Sima Guang make the same choice as the others?
questions.explanationZh: 「stayed + 沒跑走」——他做了跟別人不一樣的選擇!答案是 No,他沒跟其他人一樣跑走。
questions.sentenceZh: 他留在水缸旁,沒有跑走。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Sima Guang stayed by the big jar, looking at the water.
questions.explanationZh: 司馬光留在大水缸旁,看著水。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His friend was going under, and time was very short.
questions.question: What did Sima Guang know in that moment?
questions.explanationZh: 「friend going under + time very short」——朋友危險 + 時間急——就是「時間快沒了」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他的朋友正在下沉,時間非常短。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: "An adult will not come fast enough," he thought to himself.
questions.explanationZh: 「大人來不及來,」他在心裡想。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He could not wait. He had to do something now.
questions.question: What did Sima Guang decide?
options: act on his own at once
questions.explanationZh: 「had to do something now」——不能等,得自己動手!選「自己馬上動手」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他等不了。他得現在就做點什麼。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His bright eyes moved fast around the garden.
questions.explanationZh: 他明亮的眼睛在花園裡飛快地掃。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was Sima Guang doing in his head?
questions.question: What was he doing?
questions.explanationZh: 在心裡想、眼睛到處掃——他在「想辦法」!腦袋轉個不停呢!
questions.sentenceZh: 司馬光心裡在做什麼?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His eyes landed on something hard and heavy on the ground...
questions.explanationZh: 他的眼睛落在地上一個又硬又重的東西……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 留下 = stay｜🔑 決定 = decide｜🔑 辦法 = way｜🔑 馬上 = right now。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It was the quiet one — the boy with bright eyes.
questions.sentenceZh: 是那個安靜的、眼睛明亮的男孩。
questions.question: Who did NOT run away with the others?
questions.explanationZh: 「那個安靜的、眼睛明亮的男孩」——就是前面說的司馬光!他留下來了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He stayed by the jar and did not run.
questions.sentenceZh: 他留在水缸旁,沒有跑走。
questions.questionEn: Did Sima Guang follow the other children and run away?
questions.explanationZh: 其他人都跑走,但他「沒有跑走」——他選擇留下來!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His friend was going under. The time was very short.
questions.sentenceZh: 他的朋友正在下沉,時間非常短。
questions.question: What made the situation urgent?
questions.explanationZh: 「朋友正在下沉、時間非常短」——朋友的情況越來越危險!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He could not wait. He had to do something now.
questions.sentenceZh: 他等不了。他得現在就做點什麼。
questions.question: Which emoji shows someone thinking fast to act?
questions.explanationZh: 「等不了、現在就要行動」——腦袋轉得很快想到辦法!💡 就是靈機一動的感覺!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He could not wait. He had to do something now.
questions.sentenceZh: 他等不了。他得現在就做點什麼。
questions.questionEn: Did Sima Guang decide to wait for an adult?
questions.explanationZh: 「等不了」——他知道不能等大人,要自己馬上行動!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He looked around the garden with his bright eyes.
questions.sentenceZh: 他用明亮的眼睛環視花園四周。
questions.question: What was Sima Guang trying to do by looking around?
options: searching for a way to help
questions.explanationZh: 他四處張望——就是在「找方法」來救朋友!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: It was the quiet one — the boy with bright eyes.
questions.sentenceZh: 是那個安靜的、眼睛明亮的男孩。
questions.questionEn: Was this the same boy who had been watching quietly at the start?
questions.explanationZh: 「安靜的、眼睛明亮的男孩」——這就是故事開頭描述的司馬光!答案是 Yes!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His friend was going under. The time was very short.
questions.sentenceZh: 他的朋友正在下沉,時間非常短。
questions.question: How did Sima Guang feel about the time he had?
questions.explanationZh: 「時間非常短」——司馬光很清楚時間快沒了,一刻都不能耽誤!

storyBeat: 撿石頭砸破水缸 — 水流出來

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 pick = 撿
🔑 stone = 石頭
🔑 heavy = 重
🔑 break = 破
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Sima Guang looked around the garden for something hard.
questions.explanationZh: 司馬光在花園裡找硬硬的東西。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw a big stone resting in the grass.
questions.question: What did Sima Guang find?
options: a heavy stone in the grass
a soft pillow by the wall
a pile of soft green leaves
questions.explanationZh: 「big stone in grass」——草地裡的大石頭!選「草地裡的重石頭」!
questions.sentenceZh: 他看到草地裡有一塊大石頭。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He picked up the stone with both small hands.
questions.questionEn: Was the stone light for him?
questions.explanationZh: 「both hands needed」——要用兩手才撿得起來,代表它不輕!答案是 No!
questions.sentenceZh: 他用兩隻小手把石頭撿起來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: With all his strength, he threw the stone at the side of the jar.
questions.explanationZh: 他用盡全力,把石頭丟向水缸的側面。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He did not throw it up at the sky or down at his feet.
questions.question: Where did Sima Guang aim the stone?
questions.explanationZh: 「at the side of the jar」——就是瞄準「大水缸的側面」丟過去!
questions.sentenceZh: 他沒往天上丟,也沒往腳下丟。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The jar cracked, then broke, and water poured out fast onto the ground.
questions.explanationZh: 水缸裂開,然後破了,水快速地流到地上。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What was strong stone met thin clay walls.
questions.question: What happened to the big water jar?
options: stayed in one piece on the ground
grew bigger and held more water
broke open and let the water out
started to float in the air
questions.explanationZh: 「jar cracked + broke」——水缸裂了、破了,就是「破開讓水流出來」!
questions.sentenceZh: 堅硬的石頭遇上薄薄的陶缸壁。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water rushed out in a great wave across the garden.
questions.explanationZh: 水像大浪一樣沖過花園。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: How did the moment feel as the jar broke?
questions.question: How did it feel?
questions.explanationZh: 石頭砸下去、大浪沖出來——「咔嚓」一聲,又快又猛烈,就是「巨大又快」!
questions.sentenceZh: 水缸破掉的那一刻,感覺怎麼樣?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: And out with the water came something else...
questions.explanationZh: 隨著水一起流出來的,還有別的東西……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 石頭 = stone｜🔑 撿起 = pick up｜🔑 丟 = throw｜🔑 破 = break。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He saw a big stone in the grass.
questions.sentenceZh: 他看到草地裡有一塊大石頭。
questions.question: What did Sima Guang find in the garden?
questions.explanationZh: 他在「草地裡」發現了「一塊大石頭」——這就是他的工具!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He picked it up with both small hands.
questions.sentenceZh: 他用兩隻小手把石頭撿起來。
questions.questionEn: Was the stone light enough to pick up with one hand?
questions.explanationZh: 需要用「兩隻手」才撿得起來——說明石頭不輕!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He aimed not at the sky and not at his feet — at the side of the jar.
questions.sentenceZh: 他沒往天上丟,也沒往腳下丟——朝著水缸的側面。
questions.question: Where did Sima Guang aim the stone?
questions.explanationZh: 「朝著水缸的側面」——他瞄準側面,這樣水才能從側面沖出來救人!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The hard stone hit the thin clay wall. The jar cracked and broke.
questions.sentenceZh: 堅硬的石頭遇上薄薄的陶缸壁。水缸裂了、破了。
questions.question: Which emoji shows the jar breaking apart?
questions.explanationZh: 石頭把水缸打破——「碰!」一聲,💥 就是那個破開的感覺!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The jar cracked and broke. Water rushed out.
questions.sentenceZh: 水缸裂了、破了。水沖了出來。
questions.questionEn: Did the water stay inside the jar after the stone hit?
questions.explanationZh: 「水沖了出來」——水全都衝出去了!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He picked it up with both small hands.
questions.sentenceZh: 他用兩隻小手把石頭撿起來。
questions.question: What can we tell about the stone from how he lifted it?
questions.explanationZh: 需要兩隻手才拿得起來——這說明石頭「相當重」!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: He aimed not at the sky and not at his feet — at the side of the jar.
questions.sentenceZh: 他沒往天上丟,也沒往腳下丟——朝著水缸的側面。
questions.questionEn: Did Sima Guang throw the stone straight up into the air?
questions.explanationZh: 「不是往天上丟」——他瞄準水缸側面,不是往上丟!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The hard stone hit the thin clay wall. The jar cracked and broke.
questions.sentenceZh: 堅硬的石頭遇上薄薄的陶缸壁。水缸裂了、破了。
questions.question: What made it possible for the stone to break the jar?
questions.explanationZh: 「堅硬的石頭 + 薄薄的陶缸壁」——一硬一薄,才能破開!

storyBeat: 救出小孩 — 急時用聰明

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Here are 4 words you will meet in tonight's story.
questions.explanationZh:
本節新單字 (左中右英):
🔑 flow = 流
🔑 come out = 出來
🔑 cough = 咳
🔑 alive = 活
背熟這 4 個字,故事就會輕鬆聽懂。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The water flowed out of the broken jar in a great rush.
questions.explanationZh: 水從破水缸大量流出來。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His friend came out with the water, coughing but alive.
questions.question: What happened to the boy who fell in?
options: flew up high into the sky
questions.explanationZh: 「came out + coughing but alive」——被沖出來、咳著但沒事,就是「被沖出來而且還活著」!
questions.sentenceZh: 朋友跟著水一起衝出來,咳嗽著,但還活著。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The boy started to breathe again on the wet grass.
questions.questionEn: Did the boy come back okay?
questions.explanationZh: 「開始呼吸」——能呼吸就代表沒事了!答案是 Yes!
questions.sentenceZh: 那個男孩在濕草地上開始又能呼吸了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The other children came back with an adult, who saw what had happened.
questions.explanationZh: 其他小孩和大人一起回來,大人看到剛剛發生的事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: By then, the danger was already over.
questions.question: What had Sima Guang done before the adult came?
options: saved his friend on his own
questions.explanationZh: 大人來的時候,危險已經過了——因為司馬光「自己救了朋友」!
questions.sentenceZh: 那時候,危險已經過去了。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People still tell this story today, hundreds of years later.
questions.explanationZh: 直到今天,過了幾百年,人們還在說這個故事。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: A small boy did not wait. He thought and acted in time.
questions.question: Why do people still tell this story?
options: the path to town was long
the sun felt warm that day
questions.explanationZh: 「thought and acted in time」——及時想到辦法並行動,這就是「聰明的思考」的力量!
questions.sentenceZh: 一個小男孩沒有等。他想了、動了,剛好及時。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: In a hard moment, smart thinking can save a life.
questions.explanationZh: 在難關之中,聰明的思考可以救命。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: What helps the most when time is short?
questions.question: What helps most?
questions.explanationZh: 司馬光靠的是想清楚、快行動——關鍵就是「聰明的腦袋」!
questions.sentenceZh: 時間很緊的時候,什麼最有幫助?

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Next time something hard happens, what will you do first...
questions.explanationZh: 下次遇到難事的時候,你會先做什麼……

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: Match each Chinese word to its English meaning.
questions.explanationZh: 🔑 救 = save｜🔑 咳嗽 = cough｜🔑 活著 = alive｜🔑 故事 = story。

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: His friend came out with the water, coughing, but alive.
questions.sentenceZh: 朋友跟著水一起衝出來,咳嗽著,但還活著。
questions.question: What happened to the friend after the water rushed out?
options: ran off before the stone hit
questions.explanationZh: 「跟著水一起衝出來、咳嗽著但還活著」——被救出來了!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: The boy lay on the wet grass and began to breathe again.
questions.sentenceZh: 那個男孩躺在濕草地上開始又能呼吸了。
questions.questionEn: Was the rescued boy in good health after being saved?
questions.explanationZh: 他「開始又能呼吸了」——能呼吸就是沒事了!答案是 Yes!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: By the time the adults came, the danger was already over.
questions.sentenceZh: 那時候,危險已經過去了。
questions.question: When did the adults arrive?
options: just before the stone was thrown
at the same time as Sima Guang acted
after the boy had already been saved
while the jar was still full
questions.explanationZh: 大人到的時候「危險已經過去」——司馬光早就自己解決了!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People still tell this story today, many years later.
questions.sentenceZh: 直到今天,很多年後,人們仍然在說這個故事。
questions.question: Which emoji shows a story that has lasted a long time?
questions.explanationZh: 「很多年後人們仍在說」——這是一個流傳久遠的故事!📖

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One small boy did not wait. He thought, he acted, and he was just in time.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個小男孩沒有等。他想了、動了,剛好及時。
questions.questionEn: Did Sima Guang solve the problem by waiting for help?
questions.explanationZh: 「沒有等」——他不靠等,靠自己思考和行動解決問題!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: One small boy did not wait. He thought, he acted, and he was just in time.
questions.sentenceZh: 一個小男孩沒有等。他想了、動了,剛好及時。
questions.question: What two things did Sima Guang do to save his friend?
questions.explanationZh: 「想了、動了」——先想清楚辦法,再馬上行動!這就是司馬光的聰明!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: People still tell this story today, many years later.
questions.sentenceZh: 直到今天,很多年後,人們仍然在說這個故事。
questions.questionEn: Is this story only remembered by a few people today?
questions.explanationZh: 「人們仍然在說這個故事」——很多人都在說,不是只有少數人記得!答案是 No!

questions.speaker: narrator
questions.sentence: By the time the adults came, the danger was already over.
questions.sentenceZh: 那時候,危險已經過去了。
questions.question: What does this tell us about Sima Guang's action?
options: he needed adult help to finish
he solved everything on his own in time
the adults gave him the idea
he was lucky the adults were nearby
optionsZh: 他需要大人幫忙才完成
他自己及時解決了一切
questions.explanationZh: 大人到的時候危險已過——代表司馬光「自己及時解決了一切」!
